Beachfront Location: The Olde Whiskey Room in Queenstown offers direct beachfront access, a sun terrace, and a lush garden. Guests can relax by the bar and enjoy free WiFi throughout the apartment.
Comfortable Accommodation: The apartment features one bedroom and one bathroom, equipped with air-conditioning, a kitchenette, and a private entrance. Additional amenities include a patio, barbecue facilities, and free on-site parking.
Local Attractions: Located 7 km from Queenstown Airport, the property is close to Queenstown Event Centre (9 km) and Skyline Gondola and Luge (15 km). Activities such as skiing, hiking, cycling, and snorkelling are available nearby.

hotels.description_en:
Modern Comforts: Pure Retreat Lake View in Queenstown offers a recently renovated apartment with air-conditioning, a balcony, and free WiFi. Guests enjoy a sun terrace, private check-in and check-out services, and free on-site parking.
Relaxing Amenities: The apartment features a hot tub, picnic area, barbecue facilities, and a private bathroom with a shower. Additional amenities include a washing machine, kitchen with modern appliances, and a work desk.
Prime Location: Located 6 km from Queenstown Airport, the property is a short walk from Queenstown Resort College and Queenstown Lakes District Library. Nearby attractions include Queenstown Hill and Skyline Gondola. Hiking and boating are available in the surroundings.

hotels.name: Gibbston Valley Lodge and Spa
hotels.description_fr: Situ脙漏 au c脜鈥渦r de la r脙漏gion viticole de Central Otago, 脙聽 seulement 20 minutes en voiture de l'a脙漏roport de Queenstown, le Gibbston Valley Lodge and Spa propose un h脙漏bergement de luxe, un service personnalis脙漏 5 脙漏toiles, un restaurant sur place et un spa de jour. Les 24 villas priv脙漏es offrent une vue sur les vignobles biologiques et les montagnes de Gibbston.
hotels.description_en:
Located at the heart of the Central Otago wine region and just a 20-minute drive from Queenstown Airport, Gibbston Valley Lodge and Spa offers luxury accommodation, 5-star personal service, an on-site restaurant and a Day spa. The 24 private villas feature views over the organic vineyards and the mountains of Gibbston.
All villas are air conditioned and include a spacious and luxurious indoor living space. They open onto a private, secluded, covered deck and sunny courtyard. The large bathroom has a walk-in shower, separate bath and dual basins as well as premium, locally made beauty products.
Guests will be able to enjoy a wide variety of experiential packages, tailored to their needs and interests.
